methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iranian theater dominates as US-Israel strikes intensify and Tehran threatens Bab al-Mandeb closure.
bullets: US and Israeli forces intensified strikes across Iran, killing 34 at a top university while Pakistan proposed a two-phased truce to halt the campaign.
Tehran threatened to close the Bab al-Mandeb strait amid allegations of US-armed protesters, compounding regional maritime escalation risks.
Georgia expelled Azerbaijani journalist Afgan Sadygov during Ilham Aliyev's visit, while Armenia condemned attacks on the UAE Embassy in Damascus as Hasakah families demanded detainee releases.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian maritime threats and Caucasus diplomatic movements for spillover into Turkish border security corridors.
